title: Minestuck X Thaumia : GAME_BURNNER
description: A mod that combines the world of minestuck and thaumia
body:
This is a little mod that was made for reasons that cannot be stated

 

Host a campaign with you and your friends and face bosses

The ending is always the same

 

Choose one player to be the GAMEMASTER (Via /give and the gamemaster book) to be the one in charge
Pick another to be the very Eldricht Knight meant to wield the legendary Septum Actum

 

Battle the mortifying MUSE OF ERROR when trying to reach the end prematurely and find atleast some kind of reward for your punishment

Face the very Lord Of The Furthest Ring and test your strenght

Pick a fight with The Duces himself and question. "What is even happening anymore. Seriously why am i fighting this guy. And what was the dev on when he thought of this?"

And in the end once all is said in done. Do battle with the Eldricht Knight and end the journey

 

Do various challenges that exist. I'll save what they are for yourself

 

Beware of wendigos. That pig you're staring at might not be what you think it is (:

 

And remember. Have Fun

 

REQUIRED DEPENDANCIES MODS

 

Minstuck : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck

Thaumia : https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumia

Geckolib : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
